simple_types.name: ANADETECT_ANADETECT_Field
simple_types.code:
type ANADETECT_ANADETECT_Field is
   Cross,
   Up,
   Down)
  with Size => 2;

enumeration_literals.name: Cross
enumeration_literals.description: Generate ANADETEC on upwards crossing only.

enumeration_literals.name: Up
enumeration_literals.description: Generate ANADETEC on downwards crossing only.

simple_types.name: PSEL_PSEL_Field
simple_types.code:
type PSEL_PSEL_Field is
   Analoginput0,
   Analoginput1,
   Analoginput2,
   Analoginput3,
   Analoginput4,
   Analoginput5,
   Analoginput6,
   Analoginput7)
  with Size => 3;

enumeration_literals.name: Analoginput0
enumeration_literals.description: Use analog input 1 as analog input.

enumeration_literals.name: Analoginput1
enumeration_literals.description: Use analog input 2 as analog input.

enumeration_literals.name: Analoginput2
enumeration_literals.description: Use analog input 3 as analog input.

enumeration_literals.name: Analoginput3
enumeration_literals.description: Use analog input 4 as analog input.

enumeration_literals.name: Analoginput4
enumeration_literals.description: Use analog input 5 as analog input.

enumeration_literals.name: Analoginput5
enumeration_literals.description: Use analog input 6 as analog input.

enumeration_literals.name: Analoginput6
enumeration_literals.description: Use analog input 7 as analog input.

simple_types.name: REFSEL_REFSEL_Field
simple_types.code:
type REFSEL_REFSEL_Field is
   Supplyoneeighthprescaling,
   Supplytwoeighthsprescaling,
   Supplythreeeighthsprescaling,
   Supplyfoureighthsprescaling,
   Supplyfiveeighthsprescaling,
   Supplysixeighthsprescaling,
   Supplyseveneighthsprescaling,
   Aref)
  with Size => 3;

enumeration_literals.name: Supplyoneeighthprescaling
enumeration_literals.description: Use supply with a 2/8 prescaler as reference.

enumeration_literals.name: Supplytwoeighthsprescaling
enumeration_literals.description: Use supply with a 3/8 prescaler as reference.

enumeration_literals.name: Supplythreeeighthsprescaling
enumeration_literals.description: Use supply with a 4/8 prescaler as reference.

enumeration_literals.name: Supplyfoureighthsprescaling
enumeration_literals.description: Use supply with a 5/8 prescaler as reference.

enumeration_literals.name: Supplyfiveeighthsprescaling
enumeration_literals.description: Use supply with a 6/8 prescaler as reference.

enumeration_literals.name: Supplysixeighthsprescaling
enumeration_literals.description: Use supply with a 7/8 prescaler as reference.

enumeration_literals.name: Supplyseveneighthsprescaling
enumeration_literals.description: Use external analog reference as reference.

simple_types.name: RESULT_RESULT_Field
simple_types.code:
type RESULT_RESULT_Field is
   Bellow,
   Above)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: Bellow
enumeration_literals.description: Input voltage is above the reference threshold.

record_types.name: ANADETECT_Register
ENABLE_Register
EXTREFSEL_Register
INTENCLR_Register
INTENSET_Register
LPCOMP_Peripheral

fields.name: TASKS_SAMPLE
fields.description: LPCOMP is ready and output is valid.

fields.name: EVENTS_READY
fields.description: Input voltage crossed the threshold going down.

fields.name: EVENTS_DOWN
fields.description: Input voltage crossed the threshold going up.

fields.name: EVENTS_UP
fields.description: Input voltage crossed the threshold in any direction.

record_types.name: POWER_Register
PSEL_Register
REFSEL_Register
RESULT_Register
SHORTS_Register

fields.name: READY_SAMPLE
fields.description: Shortcut between RADY event and STOP task.

fields.name: READY_STOP
fields.description: Shortcut between DOWN event and STOP task.

fields.name: DOWN_STOP
fields.description: Shortcut between UP event and STOP task.

fields.name: UP_STOP
fields.description: Shortcut between CROSS event and STOP task.

variables.name: LPCOMP_Periph
variables.code:
LPCOMP_Periph : aliased LPCOMP_Peripheral
  with Import, Address => LPCOMP_Base;
